title: Sprint 56 Wave C: Add AllowDestructiveCommands toggle to SafetyOptions
description: The Sprint 56 Wave B council fix 2 (TSK-0277) requested an `AllowDestructiveCommands` toggle but only the DeniedCommands HashSet was implemented. This adds the toggle to SafetyOptions so that even when CommandExecutionEnabled is true, destructive admin commands are gated behind an explicit opt-in flag (default: false).
